LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE DECISIONS IN PACIFIC AIR ARE NOT CONTROLLING BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NOT DESIGNATED A PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA. AS A CONSEQUENECE, THE DECISION IN BEUTKE V AMERICAN SECURITIES (1955) 132 CAL APP 2D 354, 361 RECOGNIZES PLAINTIFF'S CHOICE OF VENUE. THE REASONING OF BEUTKE IS APPLICABLE TO BOTH CONTRACT AND TORT CLAIMS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321

Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jennifer M. Joaquin, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Northwest Airlines, Inc.
Michael Cohen, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Barbara Johnson

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION.
Defendant Northwest Airlines, Inc.'s motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories (set #1) and requests for admissions (set #2) is denied. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATION: That requests for admissions denied without prejudice. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kymberly Speer, Esq., of Kenny & Markowitz, 415-397-3100 for defendant and moving party Northwest Airlines
Michael Cohen, Esq., 415-431-4526 for plaintiff and opposing party Barbara Johnson

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. THE DECISIONS IN PACIFIC AIR ARE NOT CONTROLLING BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NOT DESIGNATED A PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA. AS A CONSEQUENECE, THE DECISION IN BEUTKE V AMERICAN SECURITIES (1955) 132 CAL APP 2D 354, 361 RECOGNIZES PLAINTIFF'S CHOICE OF VENUE. THE REASONING OF BEUTKE IS APPLICABLE TO BOTH CONTRACT AND TORT CLAIMS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321. (302/PJM/AY)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Continued To Nov-21-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC.'S MOTION TO CHANGE OF VENUE TO SAN MATEO COUNTY.
APPEARANCES: Michael Cohen, Esq. 861-4414 for pltf & opposing party; Kymberly E. Speer, Esq. of Kenney & Markowitz L.L.P. 397-3100 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 11/21/07. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
